citation: Tsuchiya S, Tsuchiya M, Momma H, Sekiguchi T, Kuroki K, Kanazawa K, Koseki T, Igarashi K, Nagatomi R, Hagiwara Y. (2017). Factors associated with sports-related dental injuries among young athletes: a cross-sectional study in Miyagi prefecture. BMC oral health.
extraction_notes: Large self-report cohort 6-15. Insufficient break, verbal abuse, physical punishment from coaches associated with higher dental injury prevalence in males only.
